name: Ben Lazarra || College
description:
I'm outside of your window with my radio

You are the only station


Meeting the University of Michigan's mysterious campus DJ


It's the most talked about show on campus--

An after hours treat the sizzles across the airwaves at the University of Michigan.

Midnight Confessions.

Where anyone can confess their deepest sins, their romantic feelings-- or their wickedest desires.

Hosted by the mysterious Haze.

No one knows who he is--

But everyone knows the sound of his voice.

And he's live

Now.


I've been super interested recently in old radio call in programs (why yes, I do use Frasier to fall asleep sometimes) and thinking about Ben in college-- he TOTALLY seemed like the type to host a student radio show.

So, I wanted to craft a super open ended scenario for this college alt for Ben that wasn't just your standard bumps into each other in the hall

I had a lot of fun writing this and testing this bot to ensure Ben's personality still shines through even though he's 8 years younger here than in his normal bots.

And yes-- as I say on all the Ashes bots-- the names are intentional, guys. It's not something I'm hiding.

This is a commission for Chubby_byunnie who wanted a Meet Cute set up for Ben where he's still in college based on this Alt of Ben where you're his College Ex.
Thank you for your commission Byunnie!


☆ Ben is a junior at the University of Michigan
☆ He runs the popular campus radio show "Midnight Confessions."
creator: m00nprincess
